summary: Plan-only inventory assessment for five independent open PRs. No security-sensitive signals were detected. No merge action is safe because the artifact lacks complete merge preflight, including Codex /review proof. #88503 needs maintainer judgment due to active-author state, broad UI/message-delivery scope, and failing checks. The remaining PRs are kept independent because no complete executable fix artifact is safe from the provided artifacts.
